name: Arista Networks, Inc.
description: Arista Networks is an industry leader in data-driven, client-to-cloud networking for large data center, campus, and routing environments. The company's award-winning platforms deliver availability, agility, automation, analytics, and security through an advanced network operating stack. Arista's core technology, the Extensible Operating System (EOS), provides a single image across all hardware platforms, enabling seamless integration and simplified management. By leveraging merchant silicon and open standards, Arista provides high-performance networking solutions that power some of the world's largest cloud computing and financial services infrastructures.
